Welcome to ReVim!
This is a line of text.
ReVim is a terminal-based text editor.
It mimics the behavior of Vim.

Basic movement keys:
  h - move left
  j - move down
  k - move up
  l - move right

Word motion:
  w - next word
  b - previous word
  e - end of word

Line numbers are not shown yet.
Visual mode selection works.
You can delete, yank, and put text.

Insert mode:
  i - insert before cursor
  a - insert after cursor
  A - append at line end
  o - open new line below
  O - open new line above

To exit ReVim:
  Press Ctrl+C to quit

Sentence motions:
  ( - go to previous sentence
  ) - go to next sentence
  { - go to previous paragraph
  } - go to next paragraph

This buffer has 46 lines total.
Scrolling is now supported!
Use ArrowDown to scroll down.
When cursor moves past viewport,
the view automatically scrolls.

Press G to jump to last line.
Press gg to return to first line.

End of demo buffer.
